ops.text: Phase 5 retrain loop + registry DONE. cc_steer/registry.py (~/.cc-steer/models/<component>/vNNN-date-digest12/ + relative current symlink, atomic flip; register/promote/rollback/prune(3); CC_STEER_MODELS override). cc_steer/watcher/gate.py LexicalGate (Gate protocol; owns artifact spec model.joblib {word_vec,char_vec,clf,temperature} + budget_2_per_100 threshold; 'gate' extra = scikit-learn). lab harness/retrain.py: delta gate on dataset digest -> E1 recipe on full train -> temperature scale -> frozen-eval -> promotion gate (beat incumbent PR-AUC AND hold recall@budget) -> register+promote+prune; train_watcher() stub pending E2. GATE v001 TRAINED+PROMOTED: pr_auc 0.9361, ece 0.2811, recall@2/100 0.0246, fire threshold 0.9905, temperature 0.7467, digest 982b4468, 121s train. Delta-gate verified (second run skipped in 2s). CLI: cc-steer models list/promote/rollback; watch --gate lexical (default when promoted); pipeline install-launchd --retrain. launchd: com.cc-steer.retrain live (Sun 04:00 -> lab harness.retrain, ccp-guarded). 287 cc-steer + 109 lab tests, ty+ruff green both repos (agent also fixed 52 pre-existing lab ty diagnostics). Remaining: exemplar index finishing (~576/3155 mid-build), then start shadow daemon w/ lexical gate + launch E2/E7.
